name: Outworld Destroyer
description: Their sanity I'll shatter; their dreams of conquest I'll destroy.

abilities.name: Arcane Orb
abilities.description: Adds pure damage to attacks based on the current mana pool. Cast Range: 450. Current Mana to Damage Factor: 0.1/0.11/0.12/0.13 (0.115/0.125/0.135/0.145). Cooldown: 4.5/3/1.5/0.

abilities.name: Astral Imprisonment
abilities.description: Places a target unit into an astral prison. The hidden unit is invulnerable and disabled. When the astral prison implodes, it deals damage to the target and steals a percentage of their max mana. Grants the Harbinger flat bonus max mana based on the enemy hero's max mana loss value when the astral prison implodes. Cast Range: 650 (750). Damage: 90/180/270/360. Max Mana Loss: 16%/18%/20%/22% (21%/23%/25%/27%). Imprison Duration: 1.75/2.5/3.25/4. Mana Steal Duration: 30/40/50/60. Self Max Mana Bonus Factor: 1. Cooldown: 18/16/14/12. Mana Cost: 150.

abilities.name: Essence Flux
abilities.description: The Harbinger has a chance to restore a percentage of its max mana per ability cast. Applies a strong dispel if the damage instance brings the Harbinger below a certain health threshold. The Harbinger then constructs an Arcane Fortitude by consuming all of its current mana and granting itself an all damage barrier. Proc Chance: 30%. Max Mana Restore: 25%/35%/45%/55%. Current Mana to Move Speed Bonus: 0.8%. Max Health Threshold: (20%). Max Mana to Barrier: (65%). Duration: (12).

abilities.name: Sanity’s Eclipse
abilities.description: Deals damage to enemy units within the radius corresponding to the difference between the Harbinger's mana and all affected units' mana. Cast Range: 700. Effect Radius: 450/525/600. Base Damage: 200/300/400. Max Mana Difference Damage Factor: 0.4 (10.4). Cooldown: 150/135/120. Mana Cost: 200/300/400.
